name: Google Workspace (MCP)
description: Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Slides via workspace-mcp — BYO OAuth client
agentDocs:
## Google Workspace (MCP)

You have MCP tools prefixed with `mcp__gws_mcp__` for the user's Google Workspace account. Use these for email, calendar, drive, docs, sheets, and slides.

Available capabilities:
- *Gmail*: search, read, send, draft, label, move, delete messages.
- *Calendar*: list calendars, list/create/update/delete events, respond to invites.
- *Drive*: list, search, upload, download, move, share files.
- *Docs*: read and modify Google Docs.
- *Sheets*: read and modify spreadsheets.
- *Slides*: read and modify presentations.

Tool names follow the underlying service verbs (e.g., `search_gmail_messages`, `list_calendars`, `create_doc`).

auth.description: Starts workspace-mcp, opens browser for Google OAuth consent, writes token file
